detail_raw_text:
回上一頁	國立金門大學	 
 	教學綱要	 

部別 : 日間部學士班	112學年度第1學期	列印日期 : 2026/05/24
科目名稱 : 簡報技巧 (Presentation Skills)	開課班級 : 應英一	學　　分 : 2.0	授課時數 : 2.0
授課教師 : 李盈興	必選修 : 選修	 	 


1.教學目標
The course takes a process approach to giving presentations and combines careful language control with communicative activities that are familiar to students. It offers students an opportunity to develop the life skill of talking about topics to an audience outside the language classroom. The objectives of the course are outlined: - Focus on presenting topics that encourage speaking from personal experience - Process approach to preparing and giving a presentation - Clear focus on how to organize a presentation - Complement the course with listening activities and model presentations - Tips for using note cards and PowerPoint  


2.教學綱要
Section 0: Getting ready
Section 1: A memorable experience
Section 2: Screen magic
Section 3: A good friend
Section 4: I'll show you how 


3.教科書
1	書名 : Present Yourself (The Second Edition): Level 1.　
出版日期 : 2015年 月 
作者 : Gershon, S.　出版社 : Cambridge University Press.　版本 : 2 


4.參考書
1	書名 : Speaking for Presentations.　出版日期 : 2019年 月 
作者 : Robinson, L.　出版社 : Taipei: Tunghua.　版本 :  

※請遵守智慧財產權觀念，依著作權法規定，教科書及教材不得非法影印與使用盜版軟體。

6.成績評定及課堂要求
Evaluations: (1) Assignments and quizzes for individuals 40%; (2) Group presentations 40%; (3) Participation 20%. 
Requirements: Students are required to prepare the weekly materials before they come to class. The teacher will check the attendance; those who are absent or tardy will lose 1 score from the final grades for each time. They should understand and be responsible for their grades. They should also show respect to others in the class by not talking aloud, not wandering from the seats, and not surfing the Internet on their smartphones.
